description_long: This humanoid robot features a compact, rounded body with a smooth, matte gray exterior and a prominent, glossy black faceplate displaying two glowing blue eye-like shapes. Its head is integrated into the torso, with two upward-pointing antennae or ear-like structures on top. The robot's arms are jointed at the shoulders and elbows, ending in simple, claw-like hands, while its legs are sturdy and mechanical, with visible knee and ankle joints and broad, stable feet. The back of the robot showcases a circular, illuminated blue element, possibly an energy core or propulsion system. Subtle panel lines and mechanical details are visible across its body, suggesting a functional, utilitarian design. The overall appearance is both friendly and futuristic, suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, gray humanoid robot with a glossy black faceplate, glowing blue eyes, jointed limbs, and a blue-lit core on its back. Its design is smooth, rounded, and functional, with antennae and mechanical details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black faceplate with blue eyes, antennae, and symmetrical arms and legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the layered back panels, antennae, and the mechanical structure of the arm and leg.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the circular blue-lit core, mechanical back details, and the backs of the limbs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the back panels, antennae, and limb joints.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides and legs straight, head facing forward, antennae upright.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing; exterior consists of integrated, smooth panels and mechanical coverings.
attribute_facial_features: Faceplate is a glossy black oval with two glowing blue eye-like shapes; no visible mouth or nose; expressionless and screen-like.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible hinge joints at shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees; hands are simple claws; limbs appear rigid but jointed for basic movement.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible sensors include two blue eye-like elements on the faceplate, likely cameras or optical sensors; no other sensors are visible.
